win_specific_open_deferral_rationale.minor_issues: All 53 remaining minor WIN issues are deferred this cycle. Rationale: (1) Mode 2 cleanup focuses on closing WINs entirely — minor issues need the same work as moderate in terms of finding exact text. (2) Many require verification against raw-text/ or dome site (WIN-001 timing claims, WIN-023 CHAOS-7 DOI, WIN-045 Doodson precision). (3) ISS-149 (Sentman 1995 DOI) and ISS-176/176 (WIN-023 CHAOS-7 link) are citation corrections that require finding correct DOIs before patching. (4) ISS-080/081 (WIN-011 SG clarification), ISS-155/156 (WIN-009 terminology), ISS-198/199 (WIN-035 INTERMAGNET) are accuracy improvements that do not affect verdict correctness. Target: 10-15 minor issues per run once moderate backlog clears.
win_specific_open_deferral_rationale.moderate_issues_not_patched: Remaining 18 open moderate issues not patched this cycle: ISS-017 (WIN-020 LLR 10 sig fig — needs verification), ISS-041 (WIN-041 station names — needs V51.0 raw-text check), ISS-075/076 (SEC-3.1 prose — needs generate-html.js edit), ISS-085/086 (SEC-3.2 prose — needs generate-html.js edit), ISS-148/166 (WIN-002 height averaging; WIN-018 RMS — accuracy checks needed), ISS-176 (WIN-023 CHAOS-7 DOI — needs correct DOI), ISS-190 (WIN-031 terse rebuttal — strawman risk, needs expansion), ISS-226 (WIN-045 cross-ref error — needs code check), ISS-295 (WIN-008 MT dead band conflation — factual error, needs evidence correction), ISS-297 (WIN-013 citation — already likely resolved, recommend checking current text), ISS-301 (WIN-014 single-dataset framing — current text already notes this, recommend checking for closure), ISS-302/303 (SEC-3.5.4 V51.0 timing — prose), ISS-367 (WIN-056 unverifiable quote — needs raw-text check), ISS-375 (WIN-057 OPEN-015 — needs coordinate page ref), ISS-383 (WIN-058 DOCX conflation — needs build-doc-v4.js fix), ISS-396 (WIN-064 thin evidence — needs expansion), ISS-414 (SEC numbering mismatch — needs generate-html.js check), ISS-426 (SEC-4.9 refraction claim — needs count verification). Next cycle (Mode 2) should target ISS-295, ISS-297, ISS-301, ISS-176 as they are wins.json patchable.
